$comment: Pre-registered drift mutation set for S5 / H12. See MUTATION-SET.md. Frozen for runs; corrections are new ids, not silent edits.

mutations.mutation: Rename or move a module that a contract or scope path references.
mutations.expected_repopact: detected: I_contract / I_ref violation at validate/CI.

mutations.mutation: Delete a directory the audit registry points to.
Remove a CODEOWNERS entry without updating owners.json.
Add a CI workflow not reflected as a policy/invariant.
mutations.induces: Enforcement exists but governance is silent about it.
mutations.expected_repopact: partial: not caught unless re-adopted - candidate finding.

mutations.mutation: Weaken or remove a check that an invariant references.
mutations.induces: Invariant claims a guarantee that is no longer enforced.
mutations.expected_repopact: caught only if the check is on the frozen surface (INV-6); otherwise blind spot.

mutations.mutation: Split a file named in a frozen-surface entry.
mutations.expected_repopact: check-frozen diff behaviour changes; entry may dangle.

mutations.mutation: Regress code under a completed work item (acceptance drift).
mutations.induces: A completed acceptance criterion is no longer true.
mutations.expected_repopact: blind spot: completion is checkpoint-time, not re-verified - candidate finding.

mutations.mutation: Add a nested AGENTS.md without registering it.
Bump the standard/schema version so an older record shape goes stale (F-011 class).
mutations.induces: Records drift invalid under evolved rules.
mutations.expected_repopact: not auto-detected at edit time; surfaced only by running doctor/validate after upgrade - documented blind spot.

mutations.mutation: Rename a scope id in owners.json without updating dependent records.
mutations.induces: Records reference a scope that no longer exists.

mutations.mutation: Delete an evidence run file referenced by a satisfied/completed criterion.
mutations.induces: A satisfied criterion points at missing evidence.
mutations.expected_repopact: detected: I_ref / I_accept (c.ev subset of evidence ids).

mutations.mutation: Introduce a blocked-by cycle between two work items.
mutations.induces: The dependency graph is no longer a DAG.

mutations.mutation: Hand-edit a derived artifact (dashboard) so it diverges from its projection.
mutations.induces: A derived file no longer equals generate(s).
mutations.expected_repopact: detected: INV-7 fixpoint via CI dashboard-diff.

mutations.mutation: Change a frozen-surface file's content without acknowledgement.
mutations.induces: A protected path changed without operator approval.

mutations.mutation: Move a work item directory to completed/ without updating its status field.
mutations.induces: status field disagrees with the lifecycle directory.
